description_long: This is a tall, slim aluminum can with a matte finish, featuring a modern and vibrant design. The upper half of the can is white, while the lower half is a bright yellow-green, separated by a wavy line. The front displays a stylized leaf pattern in green, teal, and yellow hues radiating from a central logo that reads 'Mañana' with a sloth illustration above it. Below the logo, the text 'Carbonated yerba mate' is visible, along with a small circular seal and the volume marking '250 ml'. The can has a standard pull tab on top, typical of beverage cans, and the back and sides are mostly plain with the colored pattern wrapping partially around. The overall appearance is clean, fresh, and designed to attract attention in an urban setting.
description: A tall, slim aluminum can with a white and yellow-green color scheme, decorated with a leaf pattern and the 'Mañana' logo. The can features a pull tab and modern, vibrant graphics.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Mañana' logo, leaf pattern, product description, and volume marking.
description_view_1: Side view with partial leaf pattern visible, transitioning to mostly plain yellow-green and white areas.
description_view_2: Rear view with no visible branding or graphics, just the two-tone color split.
description_view_3: Side view with the edge of the leaf pattern and part of the logo visible, mostly yellow-green and white.
